summary.lv: GR8 Tech (iGaming) attālināti meklē Senior Payment Technical Manager, kas konfigurē un uztur maksājumu metodes un MID, vada produkcijas palaišanas, sniedz L3 atbalstu un veido monitoringa paneļus apmaksu plūsmām.
summary.en: GR8 Tech (iGaming) is hiring a remote Senior Payment Technical Manager to configure and maintain payment methods and MIDs, coordinate production launches, provide L3 support, and build observability dashboards for payment flows.
